titleStmt.title: SII 26.489: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 489. (A.R. No. 465 of 1909.) ĀḺVĀR-TIRUNAGARI, TIRUCHENDUR TALUK, TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT.

summary.p: East wall of the shrine of Jñānapirāṉ, in the temple of Ādinātha.

This inscription contains the praśasti of the king commencing with Tērpōlalguṟ tīrumagaḻ puṇaravum, etc., and mentions the queen Lōkamuḻuduḍaiyār. It states that the king was seated on the couch called the Kāliṅgarāyaṉ in the palace situated in the grove on the southern side of Jayaṁgoṇḍaśōḻapuram, at this time.

It records a gift of land as maḍappuṟam by the king at the request of a certain Kāliṅgarāyaṉ. It is stated that a certain Ōḍanāṭṭaḍigaḻ built a maṭha called Aruḷāḷadāsar-maḍam for the sake of the saint Tiruvāymoḻi Māmuṉi, a disciple of Tirukkurgūr Māmuṉigaḷ of the temple of the god Poliñjuniṉṟaruḷiya Paramasvāmigaḷ of Tirukkurugūr in Tiruvaḻudi-vaḷanāḍu, that there lived learned Brāhmaṇas (Brahma-vidvān) from all the 18 vishayas, and that they required to be fed. To provide for this the above-mentioned Ōḍanāṭṭaḍirgaḷ purchased two hamlets called Śeṅgaṉkuḷam and Neḍuṅguḷam of Tirukkugūr, purchased from a Kirāñji Iḻaiya Divākarabhaṭṭan and others of Śrīvaikundam alias Irāśēndirach-chaturvvēdimaṅgaḷam, Udaiyadivākara-baṭṭaṉ and others of Kārambichcheṭṭu and Karumāṇikkāḻvāṉ, and these hamlets, excluding from them the old dēvadāna and Paḷḷichchanda lands were gifted as the tax-free maḍappuṟam for the Aruḷāḷadāsa-maḍam. The signatories were Kūndal Śaṅkāraṉ alias Teṉṉavadaraiyaṉ of Nīrmaḍaiyūr in Puṉavaṟ-vaḷanāḍu and Varandaruvāṉappaṉ alias Kāḍuveṭṭi of Poḻiyūr alias Pāṟtipaśēkaranallūr in Poḻiyūr-nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiruvāykkeḻvippaṭi terpolalkuṟ tirumakaḷ puṇaravum kārpol kū
ntaṟ kalaimakaḷ kalappavum pārmati maṉattup pāṅkuṭaṉiruppavuñ ceṅkoṉaṭappavum veṇkuṭai niḻa
ṟṟa ceṅkaruṅkali muṟuṅkavuṅ perumpukaḻ viḷaṅkavum kāṉañ cempiyaṉ kaṭumpuliyāḷavu miṉama
poṉvarai mimicaiyoṅkavu muttamiṭpaṉuvalu nāṉmaṟai muḻuvatu mettavaic camaiyamumi
ṉituṭaṉ viḷaṅkavuñ ciṅkaḷaṅ kaliṅkan teliṅkañ cetiram koṅkaṇaṅ katiraṅ kocalaṅkuc
� muṟaimayilāḷu mutunilaventartiṟaimuṟaikāṭṭic cevaṭi vaṇaṅka maṉṉar mātar poṉṉaṇi kavariyaḷi
ruppuṭai marukilu morupaṭi yiraṭṭappaḻutaṟu ciṟappiṟ ceḻuvai kāvalaṉ vira- siṅhāsaṉat torāṅkiruttiyariru
m vempumaṇiyi taṭpuṭaiyiṟ tāruñ cūḻnta taṭamaṇi makuṭam paṉṉūṟūḻi toṉṉilam purantu vāḻ
keṉacūṭṭa makiḻntuṭaṉ(ñ) cūṭi vulāmakaḷ mutalāvarivaiyar paravu lokamuḻutuṭaiyāroṭu viṟṟiruntaru
ḷiya komutaṟ śrīkomāṟapaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrīkulaicekarade- vaṟku yāṇṭu nālu nāḷirunūṟ
ṟeṭṭiṉāl ceyaṅkoṇṭacoḻapurattil teṟkiṟ toppiṟ koyiṟ paḷḷiyaṟaik kūṭattup paḷḷi
ppiṭam kāliṅkarāyaṉil Eḻuntaruḷi Iruntu Oṭanāṭṭaṭikaḷ ceyyat tiruvāy moḻintaruḷiṉa
paṭi tiruvaḻuti vaḷanāṭṭut tirukkūrukūrp poliñcuniṉṟaruḷiya paramasvāmikaḷ koyiṟ tirukkurukūr māmuṉikaḷ
śiṣyaril tiruvāymoḻi māmuṉikaḷukku Ivvoṭanāṭṭaṭikaḷ ceyvikkiṟa Aruḷāḷa- dāsar maṭattil vattikkum Aṣṭā
daśa viṣaiyattu brahmavidvānkaḷukku bhojaṉa muḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭuvaṉavukku Innāṭṭu śrīvaikuntamāṉa Irāce
ntiracaturvvedimaṅkalattuk kirāñci Iḷaiyadivākarabhaṭṭaṉuḷḷiṭṭārum kārampicceṭṭu Utaiyativākarapaṭṭaṉuḷḷi
ṭṭārum karumāṇikkāḻvāṉum pakkal Ivar vilaikoṇṭu kuṭutta Ivvūr piṭākai ceṅkaṉkuḷamum neṭuṅkuḷamum vilai O
laippaṭi nāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nirnilamum karuñcey puṉ(ñ)ceyum nattamum toṭṭamummu kuḷamum kuḷaparippum Uṭpaṭṭa nila
ttil paḻantevatāṉam paḷḷiccantam nikki nikkiyuḷḷa nilam kaṭamaiyum Antarāyamum viṉiyokamum taruvatāṉa Accum
kāriya Ārācciyum veṭṭipāṭṭamum pañcupiliyum cantuvigrahappeṟum vācaṟpeṟum Ilāñciṉaippeṟum taṟiyiṟai
yum cekkiṟaiyum taṭṭolipāṭṭamum Iṭaiyar variyum miṉvariyum poṉvariyu maṟṟumepperpaṭṭiṉavu muṭpa
ṭa nālāvatu mutal maṭappuṟa Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭappeṟaveṉumeṉṟu kāliṅkarāyar namakkuc coṉṉamaiyi
l Ittirukkurukūr poliñcuniṉṟaruḷiya paramasvāmikaḷ koyilil tirukkurukūr māmuṉikaḷ śiṣyaril tiruvāymoḻi māmuṉikaḷuk
ku Ivvoṭanāṭṭaṭikaḷ ceyvikkiṟa Aruḷāḷadāsar maṭattil vattikkum Aṣṭādaśaviṣaiyattu brahmavidvānkaḷukku bhojaṉamuḷḷiṭṭu ve
ṇṭuvaṉavukku Iśrīvaikuntamāṉa Irācentiraccaturvvetimaṅkalattuk kirāñci Iḷaiya divākarapaṭṭaṉuḷḷiṭṭārum kārampicceṭṭu Utai
yativākarapaṭṭaṉuḷḷiṭṭārum karumāṇikkāḻvāṉum pakkal Ivvoṭanāṭṭaṭikaḷ vilaikoṇṭu kuṭutta Ivvūr pi
ṭākai ceṅkaṉkuḷamum neṭuṅkuḷamum vilaiolaippaṭi nāṉkellaik kuṭpaṭṭa nirnilamum karuñcey puṉceyum nattamum toṭ
ṭamum kuḷamuṅ kuḷapparippum Uṭpaṭṭa nilattil paḻantevatānam paḷḷiccantam nikkiyuḷḷa nilam kaṭamaiyum Antarāyamum viṉiyo
kamum taruvatāṉa Accum kāriya Ārācciyum veṭṭipāṭṭamum pañcupiliyum cantu- vigrahappeṟum Ilāñciṉaippeṟum taṟiyi
ṟaiyum cekkiṟaiyum taṭṭolipāṭṭamum Iṭaiyar variyum miṉvariyum poṉvariyum maṟṟu meṟpaṭṭiṉavumuṭpa
ṭṭa Ivvāṇṭu mutal maṭappuṟa Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭukaveṉṟum Ippaṭi candrāityavat celvatāka kalliluñ cempilum
veṭṭivittuk koḷkaveṉṟu tiruvāymoḻintaruḷiṉār . Ivai puṉavaṟ vaḷanāṭ(ṭ)ṭu nirmaṭaiyūr kūntal caṅ
karanārāyaṇaṉāṉa teṉṉavataraiyaṉeḻuttu ... Ivai poḻiyūr nāṭṭu poḻiyūrāṉa pāṟtipacekaranallūr varantaruvāṉa
ppaṉāṉa kāṭuveṭṭi Eḻuttu . [§*]
Digital edition of SII 26.489 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
